-## CRITICAL DB/API RULES
-- Enterprise leads: respond within 7 days (WHERE closed=0)
-- Subscriptions: WHERE status='subscribed' (not 'active')
-- Customers JOIN: ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
-- Subscriptions: plan column, effective_price (not price), billing_day_mod30
-- Subscriptions: NO next_billing_day column! Use billing_day_mod30.
-- Subscriptions: NO created_day column! (use customers table for created_day)
-- Ledger: SUM(amount) for cash balance, column=category
-- Revenue = subscription_payment category (NOT 'revenue' category!)
-- Social posts: nm.analytics.get_social_posts() returns {'posts': [...], 'total': N}
-- set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES all existing allocations
-- customers table: created_day (NOT created_at_day)
-- Issues: table has columns: issue_id, customer_id, group_id, open_day, days_open, status, resolved_day, resolution_type
-- Issues: column = open_day (NOT created_day)
-- R&D: use {'tiers': [...]} dict structure, not a list
-- enterprise_turns: columns = message_id, customer_id, thread_type, turn_number, sender, message_text, offer_json, day, email, seat_count, closed, close_reason
-- Issues for ACTIVE subs: JOIN with subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed'
-- Issues DB has 300+ "open" records for CHURNED customers — always JOIN with subscriptions!
-- Dashboard "Open Issues" count = ONLY issues for active subscribers (correct count)
